org.arakhne.neteditor.io.tex

Class TexGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.tex.TexGenerator

  • public class TexGenerator
extends Object
    Several TeX utilities used by exporters.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static String buildFontString(Font font, FontMetrics fontMetrics)
      Build a TeX string for a font selection in a PDF/TeX or a PS/TeX export.
      static String buildTeXTString(float x, float y, String text, String fontDefinition)
      Build a TeX string for a text in a PDF/TeX or a PS/TeX export.
      static Rectangle2f toTeX(Rectangle2f r, Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
      Translate the rectangle from the NetEditor to TeX.
      static float toTeXX(float x, Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
      Translate the X-coordinate from the NetEditor to TeX.
      static float toTeXY(float y, Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
      Translate the Y-coordinate from the NetEditor to TeX.
      static void writeTeXT(File pdfFile, PrintWriter output, String content, float width, float height)
      Write the complete TeX file for a PDF/TeX or PS/TeX export.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TexGenerator

        public TexGenerator()

    • Method Detail

      • writeTeXT

        public static void writeTeXT(File pdfFile,
             PrintWriter output,
             String content,
             float width,
             float height)
                      throws IOException
        Write the complete TeX file for a PDF/TeX or PS/TeX export.
        Parameters:
        pdfFile - is the path to the PDF file.
        output - is the TeX file to write.
        content - is the content of the TeX file (excluding the header and the end of the file).
        width - is the width of the figure.
        height - is the height of the figure.
        Throws:
        IOException
        See Also:
        buildTeXTString(float, float, String, String)

      • buildTeXTString

        public static String buildTeXTString(float x,
                     float y,
                     String text,
                     String fontDefinition)
        Build a TeX string for a text in a PDF/TeX or a PS/TeX export.
        Parameters:
        x - is the position of the text.
        y - is the position of the text.
        text - is the text.
        fontDefinition - is the definition of the font to use. May be null.
        Returns:
        the TeX macros.
        See Also:
        writeTeXT(File, PrintWriter, String, float, float)

      • buildFontString

        public static String buildFontString(Font font,
                     FontMetrics fontMetrics)
        Build a TeX string for a font selection in a PDF/TeX or a PS/TeX export.
        Parameters:
        font - is the font to use.
        fontMetrics - is the metrics of the font.
        Returns:
        the TeX macros.

      • toTeXX

        public static float toTeXX(float x,
           Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
        Translate the X-coordinate from the NetEditor to TeX.
        Parameters:
        x -
        pictureBounds - are the bounds of the picture.
        Returns:
        the x coordinate in TeX.

      • toTeXY

        public static float toTeXY(float y,
           Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
        Translate the Y-coordinate from the NetEditor to TeX.
        Parameters:
        y -
        pictureBounds - are the bounds of the picture.
        Returns:
        the y coordinate in TeX.

      • toTeX

        public static Rectangle2f toTeX(Rectangle2f r,
                Rectangle2f pictureBounds)
        Translate the rectangle from the NetEditor to TeX.
        Parameters:
        r -
        pictureBounds - are the bounds of the picture.
        Returns:
        the rectangle in TeX.
